narrative:
Fairborn 202 (precinct in Greene County) has 733 registered voters, with 66.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 17.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.5%, a narrow Republican lean of 0.8 percentage points.
